rdf:Description.dc:description: Predictive-capability comparison: four foundation idealisations (Fixed base, Macro-element, Standard BNWF, Distributed BNWF) benchmarked against the 32-month Gunsan field mean f₀ = 0.2400 Hz. Horizontal bars show predicted baseline f₀; the shaded vertical bands mark ±CoV (1.53%) and ±CI95 (0.6%) around the field mean. Only the Distributed BNWF lands inside the CI band and does so on the conservative (underpredicting) side.
